event: The Terrace at Saint Germain in Spring
description: An Impressionist landscape showing a panoramic view from an elevated terrace. In the foreground, a grassy hillside slopes down past blossoming white trees toward a broad river valley. A town with white buildings nestles in the middle distance. Small figures walk along paths on the hillside. The sky is pale and overcast with soft clouds. The palette is light and airy — greens, whites, pale blues, and soft greys typical of early spring.

_meta.title: The Terrace at Saint Germain, Spring
